summary.en: EU requires AC motors to meet minimum efficiency classes IE1–IE4 as defined in IEC 60034-30-1:2014 (IE5 addressed in IEC 60034-30-2 for certain motor types). Commission Regulation (EU) 2019/1781 mandates IE3 as the minimum for most motors 0.75–1000 kW, with IE2 permitted only when used with variable speed drives. Motors must display the IE class on the nameplate.
summary.zh: 欧盟要求交流电动机符合IEC 60034-30-1:2014所定义的IE1–IE4最低效率等级（IE5部分电动机类型见IEC 60034-30-2）。委员会法规(EU) 2019/1781规定大多数0.75–1000 kW电动机最低须达IE3，仅配合变速驱动器时可使用IE2。电动机铭牌须标注IE等级。
summary.zht: 歐盟要求交流電動機符合IEC 60034-30-1:2014所定義的IE1–IE4最低效率等級（IE5部分電動機類型見IEC 60034-30-2）。委員會法規(EU) 2019/1781規定大多數0.75–1000 kW電動機最低須達IE3，僅配合變速驅動器時可使用IE2。電動機銘牌須標注IE等級。

summary.en: China uses GB 18613-2020 (Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades of Motors) which defines grades IE1–IE4 (aligned in naming with IEC 60034-30-1 but with distinct limit values). GB 18613-2020 mandates IE3 as minimum for most three-phase induction motors from 2021-06-01. The efficiency grade must be marked on the nameplate.
summary.zh: 中国采用GB 18613-2020《电动机能效限定值及能效等级》，定义IE1–IE4能效等级（命名参考IEC 60034-30-1，但具体限值有所不同）。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多数三相感应电动机最低达到IE3。铭牌须标注能效等级。
summary.zht: 中國採用GB 18613-2020《電動機能效限定值及能效等級》，定義IE1–IE4能效等級（命名參考IEC 60034-30-1，但具體限值有所不同）。GB 18613-2020自2021年6月1日起要求大多數三相感應電動機最低達到IE3。銘牌須標注能效等級。

gap.en: Although both EU and China nominally require IE3 minimum and use the IE code, the underlying efficiency limit values in GB 18613-2020 and IEC 60034-30-1 are not identical for all power/pole combinations. A motor certified at IE3 under GB 18613 may not automatically satisfy the EU IE3 threshold and vice versa. Independent verification against IEC 60034-30-1 values is required for EU market access.
gap.zh: 虽然欧盟与中国名义上均要求IE3最低等级并使用IE代码，但GB 18613-2020与IEC 60034-30-1在不同功率/极数组合下的效率限值并不完全一致。依GB 18613认证为IE3的电动机，未必自动满足欧盟IE3门槛，反之亦然。进入欧盟市场须依据IEC 60034-30-1限值进行独立核验。
gap.zht: 雖然歐盟與中國名義上均要求IE3最低等級並使用IE代碼，但GB 18613-2020與IEC 60034-30-1在不同功率/極數組合下的效率限值並不完全一致。依GB 18613認證為IE3的電動機，未必自動滿足歐盟IE3門檻，反之亦然。進入歐盟市場須依據IEC 60034-30-1限值進行獨立核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EU market surveillance under Regulation (EU) 2019/1781; non-compliant motors cannot be placed on the EU market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 18613-2020 is a compulsory national standard enforced by SAMR from 2021-06-01

source.publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the European Union

compliance_verdict.en: A motor bearing only GB 18613-2020 IE3 certification is not automatically compliant with EU Regulation (EU) 2019/1781. The exporter must verify efficiency values against IEC 60034-30-1 limits and provide a Declaration of Conformity referencing that standard. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅持有GB 18613-2020 IE3认证的电动机不能自动视为符合欧盟法规(EU) 2019/1781。出口方须对照IEC 60034-30-1限值核验效率数据，并提供引用该标准的符合性声明。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅持有GB 18613-2020 IE3認證的電動機不能自動視為符合歐盟法規(EU) 2019/1781。出口方須對照IEC 60034-30-1限值核驗效率數據，並提供引用該標準的符合性聲明。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.zh: 效率测试方法（损耗测定）
requirement_topic.zht: 效率測試方法（損耗測定）

summary.en: EU mandates that motor efficiency be determined using the loss-segregation method specified in IEC 60034-2-1:2014 (preferred Method 2-1-1B for motors ≤ 150 kW, or 2-1-1C for larger motors). This method separately measures stray-load losses rather than assuming them, producing more accurate efficiency figures. Test results and the test method used must be included in the technical documentation submitted for EU market access.
summary.zh: 欧盟要求依据IEC 60034-2-1:2014规定的损耗分类法确定电动机效率（≤150 kW推荐方法2-1-1B，较大电动机用2-1-1C）。该方法通过实测杂散负载损耗而非假定值，可获得更准确的效率数值。测试结果及所用测试方法须纳入欧盟市场准入所提交的技术文件。
summary.zht: 歐盟要求依據IEC 60034-2-1:2014規定的損耗分類法確定電動機效率（≤150 kW推薦方法2-1-1B，較大電動機用2-1-1C）。該方法通過實測雜散負載損耗而非假定值，可獲得更準確的效率數值。測試結果及所用測試方法須納入歐盟市場準入所提交的技術文件。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 1032-2012 (Test Methods for Three-Phase Induction Motors) as the primary test standard. GB/T 1032 includes multiple test methods including a simplified input-output method and an indirect method; the stray-load loss treatment differs from IEC 60034-2-1. GB 18613-2020 references GB/T 1032 for efficiency determination. [UNVERIFIED: exact clause mapping between GB/T 1032-2012 and IEC 60034-2-1:2014 should be confirmed with a testing laboratory.]
summary.zh: 中国以GB/T 1032-2012《三相异步电动机试验方法》作为主要测试标准。GB/T 1032包含多种测试方法，包括简化输入输出法及间接法；杂散负载损耗的处理方式与IEC 60034-2-1不同。GB 18613-2020引用GB/T 1032进行效率测定。[UNVERIFIED：GB/T 1032-2012与IEC 60034-2-1:2014的具体条款对应关系建议由检测机构确认。]
summary.zht: 中國以GB/T 1032-2012《三相異步電動機試驗方法》作為主要測試標準。GB/T 1032包含多種測試方法，包括簡化輸入輸出法及間接法；雜散負載損耗的處理方式與IEC 60034-2-1不同。GB 18613-2020引用GB/T 1032進行效率測定。[UNVERIFIED：GB/T 1032-2012與IEC 60034-2-1:2014的具體條款對應關係建議由檢測機構確認。]

gap.en: IEC 60034-2-1 requires measured stray-load losses (not fixed assumed values), while GB/T 1032 permits an assumed stray-load loss factor in some methods, potentially yielding a higher calculated efficiency. A motor tested only to GB/T 1032 may therefore report a higher efficiency than the same motor would achieve under IEC 60034-2-1 testing. For EU compliance, re-testing or supplementary documentation demonstrating IEC 60034-2-1 compliance is typically required.
gap.zh: IEC 60034-2-1要求实测杂散负载损耗（而非固定假设值），而GB/T 1032部分方法允许采用假定杂散负载损耗系数，可能导致计算效率偏高。因此，仅按GB/T 1032测试的电动机所报告的效率，可能高于依IEC 60034-2-1测试所得结果。符合欧盟要求通常需重新测试或提供额外文件证明符合IEC 60034-2-1。
gap.zht: IEC 60034-2-1要求實測雜散負載損耗（而非固定假設值），而GB/T 1032部分方法允許採用假定雜散負載損耗係數，可能導致計算效率偏高。因此，僅按GB/T 1032測試的電動機所報告的效率，可能高於依IEC 60034-2-1測試所得結果。符合歐盟要求通常需重新測試或提供額外文件證明符合IEC 60034-2-1。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — IEC 60034-2-1:2014 test method is required by Regulation (EU) 2019/1781 Annex II for technical documentation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory reference standard — GB/T 1032-2012 is referenced by compulsory GB 18613-2020 for efficiency determination

compliance_verdict.en: A motor with a test report based solely on GB/T 1032-2012 does not satisfy the EU technical documentation requirement for efficiency determination. An IEC 60034-2-1:2014-compliant test report from an accredited laboratory is required for the Declaration of Conformity under Regulation (EU) 2019/1781. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅基于GB/T 1032-2012的测试报告不满足欧盟关于效率测定的技术文件要求。根据法规(EU) 2019/1781出具符合性声明，须提供经认可实验室按IEC 60034-2-1:2014出具的测试报告。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅基於GB/T 1032-2012的測試報告不滿足歐盟關於效率測定的技術文件要求。根據法規(EU) 2019/1781出具符合性聲明，須提供經認可實驗室按IEC 60034-2-1:2014出具的測試報告。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
